kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: let setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; let inDate = document.querySelectorAll("input[type='date']")[0]; setter.call(inDate, "${checkin_date}"); inDate.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); inDate.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
